name: Should I worry about AI chats from my accident showing up in discovery?
description: Yes, AI chats are discoverable and can contradict your case.[1]

mainEntity.name: Should I worry about AI chats from my accident showing up in discovery?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, AI chats are discoverable and can contradict your case.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, insurance lawyers can subpoena your AI records if they differ from your story, turning speculations into ammunition.[1] No privilege protects solo AI use.[1] Key factors: Fault admissions or damage guesses harm credibility; only lawyer-directed AI might be shielded.[1] Delete nothing—tampering worsens it; tell your attorney everything. Get professional advice now.
